description: Per-page rich SEO/AEO content enrichment progress for the Vessl docs site. Resumable across sessions. Each batch deepens pages to the per-page-uniqueness floor (definition-first intro, use cases, how-it-works, examples, 5-8 FAQ, tips, distinct title/meta, lastUpdated).

seoFloor.faqPerPage: most feature/architecture/workers pages carry an FAQ block

batches.notes: Initial scaffold: all 18 pages authored from the real app code with definition-first intros, FAQ blocks on feature/architecture/workers pages, distinct titles + meta descriptions, and honest framing (limits called out: iOS not built, calendar/email gated on secrets, graceful degradation when Workers absent).

nextBatchSuggestion.rationale: Site is complete at launch depth. Future enrichment: expand each Worker into its own page with request/response examples if the API surface grows; add per-feature how-to walkthroughs; refresh lastUpdated quarterly.
